title: The Quiet Maid
overview: Ana has just arrived from Colombia and is the maid of a luxurious mansion on the Costa Brava, where a family of wealthy art dealers spends their summers. The young woman works tirelessly and without a contract, under the promise of decent conditions at the end of the summer, if she remains obedient and discreet.

trailers.title: THE QUIET MAID trailer I 2023
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
